title: SmallModelPowerContract
description: Schema for the Small-Model Power Contract — defines modules for maximizing small-model effectiveness. Static contract only, not measured improvement proof.

contract_id.description: Unique identifier for this small-model power contract

modules.description: Modules available in the small-model power contract

active_modules.description: List of active module ids for a specific contract instance

module_chain.description: Ordered chain of module activations for a specific instance

forbidden_claims.description: Claims explicitly forbidden by this contract

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this contract does and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — small model power contract is static, not runtime proof

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this contract does not claim or prove
